description: Phase parent for the small-AI-model optimization arc: mined smallcode-master research, shipped sentinel skill sk-ai-small-model (originally sk-small-model in phase 002, renamed phase 007 on 2026-05-21), structured permissions matrix (phase 003), per-model token-budget engine + output verification (phase 004), unified model-profile registry + quota-pool-aware fallback (phase 005), and cross-skill budget propagation (phase 006).
